mapper.sql:
SELECT CONCAT('xm_learning_record:', CAST(lr.record_id AS CHAR)) AS record_id, CAST(lr.user_id AS CHAR) AS user_id, lr.result_type AS result_type, '学习起点 / checkpoint' AS display_name, 'xm_learning_record' AS table_name, lr.source_type AS source_type, lr.source_session_id AS source_session_id, COALESCE(lr.source_result_id, CAST(lr.record_id AS CHAR)) AS source_result_id, lr.status AS status, lr.score AS score, lr.analysis_summary AS analysis_summary, lr.detail_ref AS detail_ref, COALESCE(lr.source_time, lr.update_time, lr.create_time) AS source_time, lr.version_no AS version_no, '学习起点结果记录，供学习中心聚合与回看。' AS note FROM xm_learning_record lr WHERE lr.result_type = 'checkpoint' AND lr.source_table = 'xm_learning_record'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('xm_quiz_result:', CAST(qr.quiz_result_id AS CHAR)) AS record_id, CAST(qr.user_id AS CHAR) AS user_id, 'quiz' AS result_type, '测验结果' AS display_name, 'xm_quiz_result' AS table_name, qr.source_type AS source_type, qr.source_session_id AS source_session_id, COALESCE(qr.source_result_id, CAST(qr.quiz_result_id AS CHAR)) AS source_result_id, qr.status AS status, qr.score AS score, qr.analysis_summary AS analysis_summary, qr.detail_ref AS detail_ref, COALESCE(qr.source_time, qr.update_time, qr.create_time) AS source_time, qr.version_no AS version_no, '测验完成后沉淀为长期结果，不回退到运行态。' AS note FROM xm_quiz_result qr
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('xm_learning_wrongbook:', CAST(wb.wrongbook_id AS CHAR)) AS record_id, CAST(wb.user_id AS CHAR) AS user_id, 'wrongbook' AS result_type, '错题本' AS display_name, 'xm_learning_wrongbook' AS table_name, wb.source_type AS source_type, wb.source_session_id AS source_session_id, COALESCE(wb.source_result_id, CAST(wb.wrongbook_id AS CHAR)) AS source_result_id, wb.status AS status, NULL AS score, wb.analysis_summary AS analysis_summary, wb.detail_ref AS detail_ref, COALESCE(wb.source_time, wb.update_time, wb.create_time) AS source_time, NULL AS version_no, '错题本挂接测验来源，便于后续回看与导出。' AS note FROM xm_learning_wrongbook wb
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('xm_learning_recommendation:', CAST(rec.recommendation_id AS CHAR)) AS record_id, CAST(rec.user_id AS CHAR) AS user_id, 'recommendation' AS result_type, '知识推荐' AS display_name, 'xm_learning_recommendation' AS table_name, rec.source_type AS source_type, rec.source_session_id AS source_session_id, COALESCE(rec.source_result_id, CAST(rec.recommendation_id AS CHAR)) AS source_result_id, rec.status AS status, NULL AS score, rec.recommendation_reason AS analysis_summary, rec.detail_ref AS detail_ref, COALESCE(rec.source_time, rec.update_time, rec.create_time) AS source_time, rec.version_no AS version_no, '推荐结果作为长期学习资产保留，不丢失来源。' AS note FROM xm_learning_recommendation rec
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('xm_learning_path:', CAST(lp.path_id AS CHAR)) AS record_id, CAST(lp.user_id AS CHAR) AS user_id, 'path' AS result_type, '学习路径' AS display_name, 'xm_learning_path' AS table_name, lp.source_type AS source_type, lp.source_session_id AS source_session_id, COALESCE(lp.source_result_id, CAST(lp.path_id AS CHAR)) AS source_result_id, lp.status AS status, NULL AS score, lp.path_summary AS analysis_summary, lp.detail_ref AS detail_ref, COALESCE(lp.source_time, lp.update_time, lp.create_time) AS source_time, lp.version_no AS version_no, '路径记录必须保留版本信息，不能简单覆盖。' AS note FROM xm_learning_path lp

if.test: query != null and query.userId != null and query.userId != ''
query != null and query.resultType != null and query.resultType != ''
query != null and query.sourceType != null and query.sourceType != ''
query != null and query.tableName != null and query.tableName != ''
query != null and query.status != null and query.status != ''
query != null and query.keyword != null and query.keyword != ''

where.if: AND ( agg.display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR agg.analysis_summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR agg.detail_ref LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR agg.source_result_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT record_id AS recordId, source_table AS tableName, display_title AS displayName, remark AS note, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, result_type AS resultType, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, score AS score, analysis_summary AS analysisSummary, status AS status, detail_ref AS detailRef, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_learning_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_table = #{sourceTable} AND source_result_id = #{sourceResultId} ORDER BY update_time DESC, record_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xm_learning_record ( record_id, user_id, result_type, display_title, source_type, source_table, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, source_time, status, score, analysis_summary, detail_ref, version_no, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.displayName}, #{record.sourceType}, 'xm_learning_record', #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.status}, #{record.score}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.detailRef}, #{record.versionNo}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )

INSERT INTO xm_learning_record ( record_id, user_id, result_type, display_title, source_type, source_table, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, source_time, status, score, analysis_summary, detail_ref, version_no, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.displayName}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.tableName}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.status}, #{record.score}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.detailRef}, #{record.versionNo}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )

INSERT INTO xm_quiz_result ( quiz_result_id, record_id, user_id, source_type, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, question_total, correct_total, status, score, analysis_summary, detail_ref, question_items_json, source_time, version_no, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.generatedId}, #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.questionTotal}, #{record.correctTotal}, #{record.status}, #{record.score}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.detailRef}, #{record.questionItemsJson}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.versionNo}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )

INSERT INTO xm_learning_wrongbook ( wrongbook_id, record_id, user_id, result_type, source_type, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, question_text, wrong_answer_text, reference_answer_text, analysis_summary, detail_ref, source_time, status, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.generatedId}, #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.questionText}, #{record.wrongAnswerText}, #{record.referenceAnswerText}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.detailRef}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.status}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )

INSERT INTO xm_learning_recommendation ( recommendation_id, record_id, user_id, result_type, source_type, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, recommendation_reason, target_type, target_ref_id, detail_ref, source_time, status, version_no, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.generatedId}, #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.targetType}, #{record.targetRefId}, #{record.detailRef}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.status}, #{record.versionNo}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )

INSERT INTO xm_learning_path ( path_id, record_id, user_id, result_type, source_type, source_session_id, source_task_id, source_result_id, path_title, path_summary, step_count, completed_step_count, total_step_count, detail_ref, source_time, status, version_no, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{record.generatedId}, #{record.recordId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceTaskId}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.pathTitle}, #{record.analysisSummary}, #{record.stepCount},
#{record.completedStepCount} 0 ,
#{record.totalStepCount} #{record.stepCount} 0 , #{record.detailRef}, #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.status}, #{record.versionNo}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.note} )
mapper.update: UPDATE xm_learning_record SET display_title = #{record.displayName}, source_type = #{record.sourceType}, source_session_id = #{record.sourceSessionId}, source_task_id = #{record.sourceTaskId}, source_result_id = #{record.sourceResultId}, source_time = #{record.occurredAt}, status = #{record.status}, score = #{record.score}, analysis_summary = #{record.analysisSummary}, detail_ref = #{record.detailRef}, version_no = #{record.versionNo}, update_time = #{record.updatedAt}, remark = #{record.note} WHERE record_id = #{record.recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT quiz_result_id AS generatedId, record_id AS recordId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, question_total AS questionTotal, correct_total AS correctTotal, score AS score, analysis_summary AS analysisSummary, detail_ref AS detailRef, question_items_json AS questionItemsJson, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_quiz_result WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1

SELECT quiz_result_id AS generatedId, record_id AS recordId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, question_total AS questionTotal, correct_total AS correctTotal, score AS score, analysis_summary AS analysisSummary, detail_ref AS detailRef, question_items_json AS questionItemsJson, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_quiz_result WHERE source_result_id = #{sourceResultId} OR detail_ref = #{sourceResultId} ORDER BY update_time DESC, quiz_result_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(AVG(score)) FROM xm_quiz_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND score IS NOT NULL

SELECT recommendation_id AS generatedId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, recommendation_reason AS analysisSummary, target_type AS targetType, target_ref_id AS targetRefId, detail_ref AS detailRef, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_learning_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY source_time DESC, recommendation_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT path_id AS generatedId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, result_type AS resultType, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, path_title AS pathTitle, path_summary AS analysisSummary, step_count AS stepCount, completed_step_count AS completedStepCount, total_step_count AS totalStepCount, detail_ref AS detailRef, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_learning_path WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY source_time DESC, path_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT wrongbook_id AS generatedId, record_id AS recordId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, result_type AS resultType, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, question_text AS questionText, wrong_answer_text AS wrongAnswerText, reference_answer_text AS referenceAnswerText, analysis_summary AS analysisSummary, detail_ref AS detailRef, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status FROM xm_learning_wrongbook WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE xm_learning_wrongbook SET result_type = #{record.resultType}, source_type = #{record.sourceType}, source_session_id = #{record.sourceSessionId}, source_task_id = #{record.sourceTaskId}, source_result_id = #{record.sourceResultId}, question_text = #{record.questionText}, wrong_answer_text = #{record.wrongAnswerText}, reference_answer_text = #{record.referenceAnswerText}, analysis_summary = #{record.analysisSummary}, detail_ref = #{record.detailRef}, source_time = #{record.occurredAt}, status = #{record.status}, update_time = #{record.updatedAt}, remark = #{record.note} WHERE wrongbook_id = #{record.generatedId}
mapper.select: SELECT recommendation_id AS generatedId, record_id AS recordId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, result_type AS resultType, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, recommendation_reason AS analysisSummary, target_type AS targetType, target_ref_id AS targetRefId, detail_ref AS detailRef, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_learning_recommendation WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE xm_learning_recommendation SET result_type = #{record.resultType}, source_type = #{record.sourceType}, source_session_id = #{record.sourceSessionId}, source_task_id = #{record.sourceTaskId}, source_result_id = #{record.sourceResultId}, recommendation_reason = #{record.analysisSummary}, target_type = #{record.targetType}, target_ref_id = #{record.targetRefId}, detail_ref = #{record.detailRef}, source_time = #{record.occurredAt}, status = #{record.status}, version_no = #{record.versionNo}, update_time = #{record.updatedAt}, remark = #{record.note} WHERE recommendation_id = #{record.generatedId}
mapper.select: SELECT path_id AS generatedId, record_id AS recordId, CAST(user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, result_type AS resultType, source_type AS sourceType, source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, source_task_id AS sourceTaskId, source_result_id AS sourceResultId, path_title AS pathTitle, path_summary AS analysisSummary, step_count AS stepCount, completed_step_count AS completedStepCount, total_step_count AS totalStepCount, detail_ref AS detailRef, source_time AS occurredAt, update_time AS updatedAt, status AS status, version_no AS versionNo FROM xm_learning_path WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE xm_learning_path SET result_type = #{record.resultType}, source_type = #{record.sourceType}, source_session_id = #{record.sourceSessionId}, source_task_id = #{record.sourceTaskId}, source_result_id = #{record.sourceResultId}, path_title = #{record.pathTitle}, path_summary = #{record.analysisSummary}, step_count = #{record.stepCount},
completed_step_count = #{record.completedStepCount},
total_step_count = #{record.totalStepCount},
detail_ref = #{record.detailRef}, source_time = #{record.occurredAt}, status = #{record.status}, version_no = #{record.versionNo}, update_time = #{record.updatedAt}, remark = #{record.note} WHERE path_id = #{record.generatedId}
